    17 April 2026

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Department of Health and Social Care, Parliamentary Updates, Written Questions

    In: Department for Culture, Media and Sport, Parliamentary Updates, Written Questions

  • McMurtry Automotive

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Stroud Constituency News

    Great to visit McMurtry Automotive’s factory down in Wotton last week. Huge thank you to Tom and the team for showing me the amazing Spéirling PURE fan car. A genuinely amazing feat of engineering, an electric car…

  • Litter Free

    29 March 2026

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Stroud Constituency News

    There’s nothing like getting out and about litter picking on a bracing Sunday morning! 15 bags was a good – but shocking – haul. We have some amazing and dedicated councillors (from a variety of parties) who…

    Dr Simon Opher

    Absolutely delighted that Rodborough Fields and Frome Banks Preservation Group have now taken ownership of part of Rodborough Fields. Many thanks to them, Stroud Common Wealth, and everyone else who worked so hard and donated so much…

  • March Together

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Parliamentary Updates

    I stand for the values of compassion, care, and community. Today, thousands will travel to London (including many from Stroud), to show our unity against the politics of hate and division. If you can’t get there, support…

  • Community Ownership Westminster Hall Debate

    26 March 2026

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Parliamentary Updates

    I have called for the establishment of a National Lido Fund. In Stroud, Stratford Park Lido is set to stay closed this summer. Many other outdoor swimming pools face immediate closure. I am pursuing additional funding, including…

  • Question for Cabinet Office – 124194

    26 March 2026

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Cabinet Office, Parliamentary Updates, Written Questions

    To ask the Minister for the Cabinet Office, what assessment he has made of the potential merits of making a formal public response to the petition dated September 2025 on the United Kingdom’s historical role in Palestine.

    ·

    Dr Simon Opher
    In: Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government, Parliamentary Updates, Written Questions
